title: calycobolus racemosus
intro: Calycobolus racemosus, also known as Calycobolus, is a plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally used in folk medicine, Calycobolus is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Calycobolus racemosus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
